subsections.text: As used in this section, unless the context otherwise requires, “vulnerable road user” means:

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: A person engaged in work upon a roadway or upon utility facilities along a roadway;

subsections.label: c
subsections.text: A person providing emergency services within a right-of-way;

subsections.label: d
subsections.text: A peace officer who is outside a motor vehicle and performing the peace officer’s duties in a right-of-way;

subsections.label: e
subsections.text: A person riding or leading an animal; or

subsections.label: f
subsections.text: A person lawfully using any of the following on a public right-of-way, crosswalk, or shoulder of the roadway:

subsections.label: I
subsections.text: A bicycle, electrical assisted bicycle, tricycle, or other pedal-powered vehicle;

subsections.label: II
subsections.text: A farm tractor or similar vehicle designed primarily for farm use;

subsections.label: XIII
subsections.text: An electric personal assistive mobility device;

A person who drives a motor vehicle in violation of section 42-4-1402 and whose actions are the proximate cause of serious bodily injury, as defined in section 42-4-1601 (4)(b), to a vulnerable road user commits infliction of serious bodily injury to a vulnerable road user.

subsections.label: a
subsections.text: Infliction of serious bodily injury to a vulnerable road user is a class 1 traffic misdemeanor.

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: In addition to the penalties imposed in subsections (3)(a) and (3)(c) of this section, the court may order the violator to:

subsections.label: I
subsections.text: Attend a driver improvement course in accordance with section 42-4-1717 ; and

subsections.label: II
subsections.text: Perform useful public service for a number of hours, which must not exceed three hundred twenty hours, to be determined by the court in accordance with section 18-1.3-507 .

subsections.label: c
subsections.text: In addition to the penalties imposed in subsections (3)(a) and (3)(b) of this section, a person who is convicted of violating this section is subject to:

subsections.label: I
subsections.text: License suspension in accordance with section 42-2-127 ; and

subsections.label: II
subsections.text: An order of restitution under part 6 of article 1.3 of title 18 .
